shows.title: Natural Remedies / Sound Healing
shows.first_half: First Half: Pharmacist Ben Fuchs will discuss the many ways natural remedies, proper nutrition, and targeted supplementation can complement modern medicine in supporting overall health and wellness. He will explain why he believes nutritional supplementation plays a vital role in maintaining everyday health.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Sound healing pioneer Jonathan Goldman will explore the science and transformative potential of sound and vibration. Examining various sounds, frequencies, and musical tones, Goldman will reveal how vibration influences the nervous system, brainwave activity, heart rate, and healing ability.

shows.title: The Art of Charisma / Mitchell-Hedges Crystal Skull
shows.first_half: First Half: Author Olivia Fox Cabane will discuss the art of charisma and how it's a learnable skill. She'll explore the psychological factors that influence how others perceive us, explain why introverts can be charismatic, and share practical insights on building authentic connection in both face-to-face and digital interactions.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Author Catherine Lanigan delves into the fascination surrounding the legendary Mitchell-Hedges crystal skull. She'll explore the artifact’s controversial origins, why it has captivated researchers for decades, and the messages and secrets some believe are connected to this enigmatic relic.

shows.title: Tesla & Ghosts / Survival After Death
shows.guests: Tim Swartz, Cheryll Jones, Dr. Mark Pitstick
shows.first_half: First Half: Producer Tim R. Swartz will discuss the groundbreaking life and inventions of Nikola Tesla. He will also delve into his latest work, "The Persistence of Ghosts," examining theories about the nature of ghosts and the intriguing consistency of ghostly encounters.
shows.second_half: Second Half: C2C's investigative reporter Cheryll Jones presents her interview with Dr. Mark Pitstick, who shares provocative evidence that human souls live on after physical death. With over forty years’ experience in hospitals, mental health centers, and private practice, Pitstick delves into deathbed miracles, angels, visitations, and visions.

shows.title: Hoarding / Open Lines
shows.first_half: Ethan Phearson is the owner of Cendecon, Inc., a biohazard remediation company. He joins guest host Ryan Wrecker (email) to delve into the mental health condition of hoarding. He'll explain all aspects of a hoarder’s life and how it is often not just a matter of being lazy or a matter of choice, but a mental health disorder. Phearson will share with us the many ways that people become hoarders, whether it is dangerous, and what can be done about it. Followed by Open Lines in the latter half. Give Ryan a call and discuss whatever is on your mind!
